detail_desc:
His only break from the constant flips and jumps are when he runs along at a
steady pace.  He looks your way and gives a wink.
long_desc: A man runs past, flipping and somersaulting his body in the air as he runs.

detail_desc:
She is so good at her juggling that she is able to nod to passersby who give
gasps of astonishment at her ability in juggling and smiles to excited
children.
long_desc: A juggler walks slowly past juggling five colored balls in rapid succession.

detail_desc:
His clear tenor voice mingles in with the flawless precision of his lute,
creating a soulful melody that uplifts spirits and makes the day just a bit
brighter.
long_desc: A street bard wanders past strumming on a lute.

detail_desc:
She seems entranced by her own song - she sings with eyes closed, with such
feeling and power.
long_desc: A wandering minstrel strolls past, her voice raised in jubilant song.

detail_desc:
He motions you closer and closer and then closer yet.  He whispers to you
that his tonics can make a man think better, run quicker and cause the woman of
his dreams to fall immediately in love with him.
long_desc: A man in bright traveler's garb bids you welcome.

detail_desc:
Milissin has the rare gift of the ability to change her voice at command.
She can sound mean, sad, scared or happy at will, making her a very effective
storyteller.
long_desc: Milissin reads from her tome, her voice changing with each character's lines.

detail_desc:
The monkey keeps tethered to the bard's waist by means of a thin rope which
is attached to a collar around the monkey's neck.
long_desc: A small monkey dances in time with the melody of the bard.

detail_desc:
He seems to be everywhere at once, a flurry of movement and noise that no
one can get a lid on.
long_desc: A parentless little kid runs past, screaming in delight at the wonders around him.

detail_desc:
She sits with her hands folded over each on the table, neither looking
toward you or away from you.  Looking closer, you begin to think that she may
be very blind.
long_desc: An old crone sits unmoving in the darkness of this place.

detail_desc:
She concentrates on the cards before her, as if reading something of some
important in the way they lay on the ground.
long_desc: A woman sits cross-legged on the ground, a deck of strange cards spread out before her.

detail_desc:
It is hard not to blush watching this full grown woman go through her
sensuous moves - but then, it is just as hard to look away.
long_desc: A gypsy dancer sways with the beat of the music, her hips a gyrating phenomenon.

detail_desc:
He is a wonderful dancer in all rights - she is simply a bit more interesting
to watch than he is .
long_desc: A gypsy man attempts to keep time with his female counterpart.

detail_desc:
The man sings and talks jovially to all of his customers, as if there is no
other place in Dibrova that he would rather be.
long_desc: A man covered in tattoos and piercings serves food from a large grill.

detail_desc:
That almost felt like the little punk was trying to lighten your load a bit.
Best to try and ask him what his intentions were.
long_desc: A little kid bumps into you and goes off running in another direction.

detail_desc:
She seems riveted by the performance, although there really isn't much to it
- the actors are definitely not professionals.
long_desc: A woman sits upon the grass, watching the performance on the stage.

detail_desc:
She calls in a loud voice to all who will listen to get what she has while
she still has it - only a few left and going quick.
long_desc: A vendor walks the festival, carrying a crate filled with foodstuffs.

detail_desc:
He walks with his hands in his pockets, a travel-worn cape slung over his
left shoulder.  He meets no eyes nor does he evade them, he simply strolls
along minding his own business.
long_desc: A rootless man roams the festival, heading in no particular direction at all.

detail_desc:
He sways gently in his position on the stump, eyes closed and humming to the
song his lute carries.  It must be a fine thing indeed to be so very in tune
with one's inner self.
long_desc: A bard rests upon the stump, lost in song as he strums his lute.

detail_desc:
The song is as fine as any produced through a metal instrument such as a
flute.  She plays with such skill and feeling that even the wind seems to
listen to her song.
long_desc: A woman sits at the riverbank, softly playing a song through a bamboo reed.

detail_desc:
The woman sports a long tail and a set of whiskers made to make even the
most stoic of onlookers grin.  She plays her part well.
long_desc: A woman dressed as a cat enacts her part in the production.

detail_desc:
It really does not take a great deal of talent to play the part of a
mushroom, however the man recites his line with precision and clarity.
long_desc: A man dressed as a huge mushroom stands still as he recites his lines.

detail_desc:
She hums as she scrubs and cleans, apparently happy with her lot in life and
pleased to be cleaning clothes in a river.
long_desc: A gypsy woman kneels at water's edge cleaning her clothes.

detail_desc:
He wears only the baggy pants commonly worn by the gypsy clans, sweat
pouring from his body.  Maybe you ought to help the poor fella?
long_desc: A burly gypsy mends a broken wheel on the wagon.

detail_desc:
He is quite stout but makes up for his lack in height in strength.  His arms
are heavily muscled and tanned.
long_desc: A gypsy man shoes a horse, tapping nails in gently.

detail_desc:
There really is nothing worse than a mime, except maybe a politician.
Please put this one out of its misery.
long_desc: A mime silently moves past, acting as if trapped in a moving glass prison.

detail_desc:
She seems to truly enjoy the fun and excitement that each child exhibits
when a new face is painted on and the child leaps from his or her chair,
laughing in delight.
long_desc: A smiling gypsy woman paints the faces of delighted children.

detail_desc:
He massages his shins and lower legs, getting the cramps out from the
performances onstage.
long_desc: One of the performers rests after a gruelling performance on stage.

detail_desc: She stares at the sky as she breathes, lost in thought.
long_desc: A woman lies on her back, catching her breath after a tiring show.

detail_desc:
He walks along attempting to appear unimpressed by the antics of the
gypsies, however his open eyes and twisting neck give him away.
long_desc: A townsman walks along, taking in the sights and sounds of the festival.

detail_desc:
This bumpkin makes no attempt to hide the fact that he only sees this many
people when he comes to town once a month - and then only the same faces.
long_desc: A wide-eyed countryman walks the festival, amazed at all the people and sights.

detail_desc:
It appears that this woman feels that these workers are not of the same
level of stature as she and that they should pay heed to where she treads.
Most of them pay her no heed at all.
long_desc: A townswoman sniffs at the workers of the festival, taken aback at their filthiness.

detail_desc:
Although he seems to enjoy a great many of the tricks and shows that go on,
he still keeps one hand on his dagger - just in case any of those MoS types
show up.
long_desc: An elven wanderer walks the festival, his gait steady and dextrous.

detail_desc:
She seems so happy, so pleased to be out and about among people.  Poor
thing, she must not get out very much.
long_desc: A stout countryman's wife bounces through the festival, smiling warmly.

detail_desc:
This is a simple man, a man of low birth who has never known much of the
fine life or wandering.  All of this is almost too much.
long_desc: A farmer walks through the festival with a disbelieving look fixed upon his face.

detail_desc: She looks around in all directions, trying to see everything at once.
long_desc: A woman in a simple spun dress looks around in joy and wonder.

detail_desc:
He does all of his tricks with a smile and a flourish, sometimes including
people in his routine as he dives and rolls between their legs.
long_desc: A midget runs through the crowds, back-flipping and somersaulting.

detail_desc:
The poles seem almost an extension of his own legs.  He never falters,
stumbles or rests for any period of time.
long_desc: A man walks through the festival on tall wooden poles.

detail_desc:
He does not appear to be bothered that he is taking his break, or more aptly
put, nap in the middle of this throng of people.  He rests easily, his chest
rising and falling in rhythmic sleeping patterns.
long_desc: A gyspsy lounges on the grass, arms folded under his head.

detail_desc:
He tosses the swords, spinning them away as fast as he catches them toward
his partner in red who does just the same right back.
long_desc: A man in a silver tunic juggles curved broadswords with his partner.

detail_desc:
As his partner catches and throws the spinning swords back at him, this man
talks animatedly with the crowd, urging them to throw a coin or two their way.
long_desc: A man in a red tunic juggles curved broadswords with his partner.

detail_desc:
Her main function is to be sure that these animals do not injure the
children who pet them.  And that is exactly what she does.
long_desc: A woman tends to the animals, keeping a close watch on them.

detail_desc: He looks up at you.  He smirks and says, 'Roar.  '
long_desc: A child runs past, his face painted like a lion.
short_desc: a child with his face painted

detail_desc:
He bobs his head with each word he whispers, as if agreeing that what he is
saying are the proper lines, psyching himself for his time on stage.
long_desc: A man stares off into space, reciting his lines quickly and quietly.

detail_desc:
As she paces along she mutters to herself, praising her own ability to sing
and dance, giving herself confidence for her time on stage.
long_desc: A woman nervously paces back and forth at the edge of the stage.

detail_desc: She squeals in delight as she runs along, meowing and purring at intervals.
long_desc: A child pushes past, her face painted up like a kitty-cat.
short_desc: a child with her face painted

detail_desc: It is only face paint, but he appears to be taking his role quite seriously.
long_desc: A child with a painted-on skeleton face looks somberly up at you.
short_desc: a child with his face painted

detail_desc:
He is fat and red-faced, a dirty turban wrapped around his head.  He wears a
set of soiled robes which have at least on hue of every color under the sun on
them.
long_desc: A man leans out of his cart, bidding you to take a look at his fine goods.

detail_desc:
She offers the 'finest in all the land' for exotic cloth, found only at the
outer fringes of the world and beyond.
long_desc: A woman draped in awful-colored clothing stands proudly at her wagon.

detail_desc:
She bids you to take a look at her fine wares, all at a price which can be
made specially for you - but only today, right now!
long_desc: A woman draped in cheap jewelry beckons you in closer.

detail_desc:
He looks up from time to time to make sure his audience is enjoying the
show, but for the most part this rat-nosed man seems engrossed in his job.
long_desc: The puppet master causes his little creatures to dance and cavort comically.

detail_desc:
Every now again a muffled snort or a swish of the tail is affected - other
than that, it just stands there looking bored.
long_desc: A sturdy pack horse patiently waits on his shoes.

detail_desc:
His eyes are a bit red around the edges, his smile a bit too loose.  He may
have taken a couple swills himself...
long_desc: A gypsy man with a big sloppy grin serves the ale.

detail_desc: He is a tall, broad-shouldered man who takes his drink very seriously.
long_desc: A man is here throwing back the beers.

detail_desc:
It doesn't appear that he is a heavy drinker, but he does keep a firm grip
on his mug.  Maybe he is afraid the misses will take it away...
long_desc: A farmer drinks some ale as he watches the stage show.

detail_desc:
He tries to start conversations with just about anyone who will listen - he
has a story for just about everything.
long_desc: One of the locals of the area stands near the keg, refilling his glass frequently.

detail_desc: He looks no older than fifteen or sixteen, with freckles and all.
long_desc: A farmhand watches starry-eyed as the gypsy dancer moves her hips.

detail_desc: He may be blushing, but he sure ain't turning around, either.
long_desc: A young lad of the city blushes as he watches the gypsy dancer move.

detail_desc:
She sure makes a lot of racket for someone who hasn't moved from her spot in
front of male gypsy dancer for the last hour and a half.
long_desc: An older woman clucks in disapproval at the display onstage.

detail_desc: He must be on break or between shows, the lucky guy.
long_desc: A gypsy watches his fellow brethren as they go about their dance.

detail_desc:
This poor little dear is certainly a candidate for recruitment into the
gypsy band.
long_desc: A young country girl watches in rapture as the dancers make their exotic moves.

detail_desc:
She is spattered in stains and grease, but seems to be enjoying herself just
the same.
long_desc: A gypsy woman prepares food for the hungry festival-goers.

detail_desc:
He tries not to appear too excited, but he bounces from foot to foot with
anticipation in his eyes.
long_desc: An excited child waits as he gets his face painted.

detail_desc:
A thin line of spittle runs out of the corner of his mouth, but he doesn't
notice it.  He stares up in awe at the storyteller as the relates the story.
long_desc: A wide-eyed child listens raptly to the story.

detail_desc:
Her ponytails droop unmoving as she listens to the story, not moving muscle,
listening with every part of her being.
long_desc: A little girl listens raptly as the story unfolds.

detail_desc:
He almost looks as if he were in a trance of some sort, lost so deeply in
the plot of the story that he lost track of the real world.
long_desc: A young lad listens to the story with wonder in his eyes.

detail_desc:
An old english looking fellow with gray hair and a gray moustache.  He
features are warm and friendly, and he seems overly exciting to satisfy your
request.  He is dressed in the traditional butler's garb and is standing
upright like a englishman should.
long_desc: Duvois' personal butler stands here ready for your request.
